$comment: Scoped to this dir only — does not affect the parent x402_facilitator npm/vitest project. nodeModulesDir: auto gives THIS folder its own local node_modules (x402_facilitator/notebooks/node_modules), fully installed and hoisted/deduped via standard npm resolution, driven purely by the npm: specifiers in the notebooks (no package.json needed). This is a DIFFERENT, complete, self-contained node_modules — not the ancestor ../node_modules (which only has the facilitator's own deps and caused an earlier, unrelated resolution failure). Chosen over Deno's global-npm-cache resolution (nodeModulesDir: none) after repeated ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND failures from that scheme's internal multi-version dedup (a real viem@2.55.1_1 duplicate-folder bug that kept recurring even after clean cache wipes). lock: false disables deno.lock creation/checking for this dir.
